digest.component_or_area: rebar code-review extension seam and project-criteria review gate
propositions: The advertised code-review extension seam is incomplete: a net-new LLM-backed project criterion is not dynamically fanned into Pass 1, resolved by the eval surface, or consulted through repository-aware Pass 3 routing.

The seam repair must map logical project.<name> ids to validator-safe physical code-review-project-<name> ids without adding any project.review-phase-boundaries special case, keeping routing JSON keyed by the logical id.

A single co-located project criterion project.review-phase-boundaries enforces the four-phase contract (discover, assess, decide, coach) by failing changes that move assessment, disposition, or remediation across phases and passing changes that only refine a phase's owned concern.
The project criterion ships with block_threshold 0.90 and blocking_enabled false, remaining advisory-only until real Gerrit dogfood evidence supports a separate posture change.
A balanced eval corpus (RP-F1..RP-F6 positive, RP-N1..RP-N6 negative) must discriminate all twelve cases with recall 1.0, false-accept 0.0, and stable agreement before live rollout.
Overlay-absent repositories must preserve their pre-change results, pinned by compatibility tests in the seam bug.
